title: Coalie
description: Welcome to Coalie! A Mod to Make Diamonds...
body:
Welcome to Coalie! A Mod to Make Diamonds...

  

Using coal blocks, you can make a compressed coal, compressed coal makes double compressed coal, then triple, then quadruple (approximately 60K coal per quadruple compressed).

 
Then smelt that quadruple compressed coal to make a diamond!
 

Attention: This is my first mod, and I'd appreciate your feedback!
